message:
feat(render,core): buffer enhancements and allocation budget testing

Render buffer:
- buffer.rs: Significant enhancements to buffer operations (+699 lines)
- double_buffer_bench.rs: Expanded double-buffer benchmarks

New test:
- allocation_budget_integration.rs: Integration tests for allocation budgeting

Core:
- terminal_capabilities.rs: Minor capability detection fix
